e: The ones digit 2 is less than 7, so regroup: take 1 ten and add it to the ones. Now subtract 12 - 7 = 5 ones. Subtract tens: 3 - 1 = 2. The answer is 25.
Regroup: 3 < 8, so take 1 ten. 13 - 8 = 5 ones. 4 - 2 = 2 tens. The answer is 25.
Regroup: 1 < 4, so take 1 ten. 11 - 4 = 7 ones. 5 - 3 = 2 tens. The answer is 27.
Regroup: 5 < 9, so take 1 ten. 15 - 9 = 6 ones. 6 - 4 = 2 tens. The answer is 26.
Regroup: 3 < 6, so take 1 ten. 13 - 6 = 7 ones. 7 - 5 = 2 tens. The answer is 27.

t: A jar has 51 marbles. You take out 24. How many marbles are left?
e: Regroup: 1 < 4, so take 1 ten. 11 - 4 = 7 ones. 4 - 2 = 2 tens. There are 27 marbles left.
Regroup: 4 < 8, so take 1 ten. 14 - 8 = 6 ones. 8 - 3 = 5 tens. The answer is 56.
Regroup: 6 < 9, so take 1 ten. 16 - 9 = 7 ones. 2 - 1 = 1 ten. The answer is 17.

t: There are 72 kids at a party. 35 kids go home. How many kids are still at the party?
e: Regroup: 2 < 5, so take 1 ten. 12 - 5 = 7 ones. 6 - 3 = 3 tens. There are 37 kids still at the party.
Regroup: 0 < 3, so take 1 ten. 10 - 3 = 7 ones. 5 - 2 = 3 tens. The answer is 37.
Regroup: 5 < 7, so take 1 ten. 15 - 7 = 8 ones. 7 - 4 = 3 tens. The answer is 38.
Regroup: 4 < 8, so take 1 ten. 14 - 8 = 6 ones. 3 - 1 = 2 tens. The answer is 26.

t: A shelf has 63 books. A student returns 0 books and checks out 27. How many books are on the shelf now?
e: Regroup: 3 < 7, so take 1 ten. 13 - 7 = 6 ones. 5 - 2 = 3 tens. There are 36 books on the shelf.
Regroup: 1 < 5, so take 1 ten. 11 - 5 = 6 ones. 8 - 5 = 3 tens. The answer is 36.
Regroup: 0 < 6, so take 1 ten. 10 - 6 = 4 ones. 4 - 1 = 3 tens. The answer is 34.
Regroup: 7 < 9, so take 1 ten. 17 - 9 = 8 ones. 6 - 3 = 3 tens. The answer is 38.

t: A bag has 82 gummy bears. You eat 45 of them. How many gummy bears are left?
e: Regroup: 2 < 5, so take 1 ten. 12 - 5 = 7 ones. 7 - 4 = 3 tens. There are 37 gummy bears left.
Regroup: 6 < 9, so take 1 ten. 16 - 9 = 7 ones. 5 - 2 = 3 tens. The answer is 37.
Regroup: 8 < 9, so take 1 ten. 18 - 9 = 9 ones. 4 - 3 = 1 ten. The answer is 19.
Regroup: 3 < 6, so take 1 ten. 13 - 6 = 7 ones. 6 - 4 = 2 tens. The answer is 27.
